parameter.defaultValue: 1. Host Cancels Event when Invitee Accepted
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 2. after changing the host while evnt cancellation check whether adding user/guest working or not.
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 3. Host Cancels Event when Invitee Declined
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 5. Both Host and Participant Cancel Event
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 6. Host Cancels Event when Invitee Accepted after both preorder - After 15 min -Me Only
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 7. only host preorders & cancels the event & guest - After 15 min -Me Only
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 8. Host Cancels Event when Invitee Accepted after both preorder - After 15 min - Cancel for all
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 9. Host Cancels Event when Invitee Accepted after both preorder - Before 15 min - Cancel for all
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 10. Host Cancels Event when Invitee Accepted after both preorder - before 15 min -Me Only
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 11. only host preorders & cancels the event & guest -before 15 min -Me Only
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@accessibilityLabel='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @name='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @label='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @accessibilityIdentifier='BOOKING CANCELLED' or @content-desc='BOOKING CANCELLED']
parameter.name: Element
